---
title: "LLM-assisted code development"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{LLM-assisted code development}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

Use `twinfake` to create a fake data root before asking an LLM or coding agent
to help with import, cleaning, wrangling, modelling, reporting, or validation
code.

```{r, eval=FALSE}
make_fake_folder("data/private", "data/fake", overwrite = TRUE)

# Point development code at data/fake instead of data/private.
```

Generated data should still be reviewed before being sent to external systems.
